alam_mo_ba: Filipinos have a concept called 'gigil' — the overwhelming urge to squeeze or pinch something unbearably cute. It has no English equivalent. Filipino emotional vocabulary is full of these precise, untranslatable feelings.
completion_reward.alam_mo_ba_display: Show 1 random fun fact on lesson completion screen.

progress_ring.display: Ring animates from X/5 to (X+1)/5 on session completion
